infrastructure_note: EDS_TOKEN not available. Preview URLs (aem.page) return 404. Screenshot pairs CANNOT be captured — this FAIL is an expected infrastructure constraint, not a migration-logic failure. HTML artifact quality assessed independently as instructed.

issues.details: No preview screenshots can be captured for any of the 16 pilot pages. Without EDS_TOKEN, da.live uploads did not occur, preview URLs return 404, and Playwright visual comparison is impossible. 0/16 pages have desktop+mobile screenshot pairs.
issues.remediation: Provide EDS_TOKEN and re-run the pilot upload phase. Once aem.page previews are live, re-run this verifier to capture screenshot pairs and compute similarity scores.

issues.details: Zero pilot pages were successfully uploaded to da.live. All 16 migrated status files record failureReason: 'EDS_TOKEN not available'. The HTML artifacts are staged locally in content-staging/ only. The admin.da.live Source API would return 404 for all pilot paths.
issues.remediation: Set EDS_TOKEN environment variable and re-run the pilot upload step. Content is ready in .eds-migration/state/content-staging/.

issues.details: 15 of 28 manifest archetypes (54%) have pilot HTML files. 13 archetypes are entirely unrepresented: analytical, api-chemical, bd-team-profile, blog-category, careers-resource, client-portal, clinical-technologies, commercial-services, discovery, events, knowledge, news, pharma-drug. A complete pilot should cover all or nearly all archetypes to validate migration logic.
issues.remediation: Generate pilot HTML for the 13 missing archetypes using source-bundle pages: analytical-solid-state, api-chemical-development, business-development-team-aidan-kelly, blog-category-uncategorized, careers-resource-bioinformatics-scientist, client-portal-waybill, clinical-technologies, commercial-services, discovery, events, knowledge, news, pharmaceutical-drug-product-development.

issues.details: 5 of 12 comparable pilot pages fail the 50% word-overlap threshold against source-bundle counterparts (after removing nav/footer/form/cookie-banner noise). contact-us: 0.45, expert-profile: 0.44, award: 0.28, api-chemical-product: 0.25, careers-story: 0.34. Caveat: for award (18 clean source words), api-chemical-product (173 words but 261-option country form), and expert-profile (source mostly sidebar navigation), the source-bundle captures are thin/noisy and staged content is arguably more complete. True concern: careers-story (0.34, 38 clean source words) and contact-us (0.45, form replaced with HubSpot block).
issues.remediation: Expand careers-story staged HTML with full story narrative. Verify contact-us form replacement is intentional. Accept low overlap for award/api-chemical-product/expert-profile as source-bundle measurement artifacts.

issues.details: diagnostics.html contains 3 href values using WordPress post-ID URLs (https://www.almacgroup.com/?p=92072, ?p=92127, ?p=92129) for upcoming events. These will produce broken links in EDS.
issues.remediation: Resolve ?p= post IDs to canonical pretty URLs or event slugs before final import.

issues.details: Several single-column block tables (Breadcrumbs, Fragment, Video) use <th> without colspan in about/index.html, clinical-services/index.html, contact-us/index.html, index.html. EDS recommends colspan='2' for all block headers.
issues.remediation: Add colspan='2' to single-column <th> elements for consistency.

issues.details: 10 of 16 migrated status files do not include a 'stagedAt' field pointing to the committed HTML artifact path. HTML files exist and are locatable by URL convention, but the missing cross-reference complicates downstream automation.
issues.remediation: Update the 10 status files to include stagedAt pointing to the correct content-staging path.

html_quality_assessment.eds_block_tables: PASS — all 16 content pages use valid EDS table syntax with named block headers
html_quality_assessment.section_breaks: PASS — all substantial content pages use <hr> section dividers
html_quality_assessment.metadata_tables: PASS — all 16 content pages end with a Metadata table containing title and description
html_quality_assessment.nav_footer_canonical: PASS — exactly one nav.html (17 nav links, logo present) and one footer.html (20 links, contact details, copyright line)
html_quality_assessment.ephemeral_paths: PASS — no /home/claude or /tmp/ references in any HTML artifact
html_quality_assessment.pending_patterns: PASS — 2 redirect pages documented (biotech/ to events, pharma-services/ to workshop landing page)
html_quality_assessment.block_names: PASS — all block names match known EDS block palette (hero, cards, columns, breadcrumbs, stats, metadata, fragment, hubspot form, job listing, profile, section metadata)
html_quality_assessment.image_urls: PASS — all image src attributes use absolute HTTPS URLs (required for staged migration)
html_quality_assessment.absolute_internal_links: WARN — 3 WordPress post-ID links in diagnostics.html need resolution

content_fidelity_summary.method: word-set overlap after removing scripts/styles/nav/header/footer/forms/select/cookie-banner noise; 4+ char alpha words; threshold 0.50 (0.35 for pages with <30 clean source words)

results.note: form replaced with HubSpot block — deliberate structural change
source bundle has 13 clean words — very thin capture
source mostly navigation sidebar; staged has richer content
source had 18 clean words (cookie banner dominated); staged has fuller content
source dominated by 261-option country form; staged structured correctly with HubSpot Form block
source had 38 clean words; staged has content but some story narrative missing

content_fidelity_summary.note: Most failures are measurement artifacts from thin/noisy source-bundle captures. Manual spot-check of careers-story and contact-us recommended.

evidence.render_strategy: SKIPPED — no EDS_TOKEN; preview URL returns 404
evidence.finding: HTML artifact present (226 lines, 9 block tables, 7 section breaks). Word overlap 0.55 PASS. Contains Hero (carousel), Stats, Cards (services), Fragment blocks. Metadata table complete with title and description.
HTML present (111 lines, 7 block tables, 5 section breaks). Word overlap 0.61 PASS. Hero, Columns, Cards blocks present. Section Metadata used for styled sections.
Word overlap 0.87 PASS. High fidelity. 11 block tables, 9 section breaks. Contains WordPress post-ID links (low severity).
Word overlap 0.87 PASS. Excellent fidelity — full article text, blockquotes, numbered notes. Metadata with publish-date and division fields.

evidence.preview_artifact: N/A — nav.html is a chrome fragment
evidence.finding: PASS. Single canonical nav.html. Contains logo img, 8 primary service links, 8 secondary links. 17 total href links. HTML is minimal and EDS-compliant.

evidence.preview_artifact: N/A — footer.html is a chrome fragment
evidence.finding: PASS. Single canonical footer.html. Contains logo, 9 service links, 3 contact phone numbers (EU/US/APAC), 3 social links, copyright. 20 total href links.

summary: FAIL — infrastructure blockers (no EDS_TOKEN, no live previews, no screenshot pairs) prevent full validation; HTML artifact quality is GOOD (all 16 pages use valid EDS block tables, section breaks, and metadata tables; nav/footer canonical; no ephemeral paths; redirects documented), but only 54% archetype coverage (15/28) and 5/12 content fidelity failures (mostly source-bundle measurement artifacts rather than true migration errors)
